이사야 28:1.content: Woe to the crown of pride of the drunkards of Ephraim, and to the fading flower of his glorious beauty, which is on the head of the fertile valley of those who are overcome with wine!

이사야 28:2.content: Behold, the Lord has a mighty and strong one. Like a storm of hail, a destroying storm, and like a storm of mighty waters overflowing, he will cast them down to the earth with his hand.

이사야 28:3.content: The crown of pride of the drunkards of Ephraim will be trodden under foot.

이사야 28:4.content: The fading flower of his glorious beauty, which is on the head of the fertile valley, shall be like the first-ripe fig before the summer; which someone picks and eats as soon as he sees it.

이사야 28:5.content: In that day, Yahweh of Armies will become a crown of glory and a diadem of beauty to the residue of his people,

이사야 28:6.content: and a spirit of justice to him who sits in judgment, and strength to those who turn back the battle at the gate.

이사야 28:7.content: They also reel with wine, and stagger with strong drink. The priest and the prophet reel with strong drink. They are swallowed up by wine. They stagger with strong drink. They err in vision. They stumble in judgment.

이사야 28:8.content: For all tables are completely full of filthy vomit and filthiness.

이사야 28:9.content: Whom will he teach knowledge? To whom will he explain the message? Those who are weaned from the milk, and drawn from the breasts?

이사야 28:10.content: For it is precept on precept, precept on precept; line on line, line on line; here a little, there a little.

이사야 28:11.content: But he will speak to this nation with stammering lips and in another language,

이사야 28:12.content: to whom he said, “This is the resting place. Give rest to weary,” and “This is the refreshing;” yet they would not hear.

이사야 28:13.content: Therefore Yahweh’s word will be to them precept on precept, precept on precept; line on line, line on line; here a little, there a little; that they may go, fall backward, be broken, be snared, and be taken.

이사야 28:14.content: Therefore hear Yahweh’s word, you scoffers, that rule this people in Jerusalem:

이사야 28:15.content: “Because you have said, ‘We have made a covenant with death, and we are in agreement with Sheol. When the overflowing scourge passes through, it won’t come to us; for we have made lies our refuge, and we have hidden ourselves under falsehood.’ ”

이사야 28:16.content: Therefore the Lord Yahweh says, “Behold, I lay in Zion for a foundation a stone, a tried stone, a precious cornerstone of a sure foundation. He who believes shall not act hastily.

이사야 28:17.content: I will make justice the measuring line, and righteousness the plumb line. The hail will sweep away the refuge of lies, and the waters will overflow the hiding place.

이사야 28:18.content: Your covenant with death shall be annulled, and your agreement with Sheol shall not stand. When the overflowing scourge passes through, then you will be trampled down by it.

이사야 28:19.content: As often as it passes through, it will seize you; for morning by morning it will pass through, by day and by night; and it will be nothing but terror to understand the message.”

이사야 28:20.content: For the bed is too short to stretch out on, and the blanket is too narrow to wrap oneself in.

이사야 28:21.content: For Yahweh will rise up as on Mount Perazim. He will be angry as in the valley of Gibeon; that he may do his work, his unusual work, and bring to pass his act, his extraordinary act.

이사야 28:22.content: Now therefore don’t be scoffers, lest your bonds be made strong; for I have heard a decree of destruction from the Lord, Yahweh of Armies, on the whole earth.

이사야 28:23.content: Give ear, and hear my voice! Listen, and hear my speech!

이사야 28:24.content: Does he who plows to sow plow continually? Does he keep turning the soil and breaking the clods?

이사야 28:25.content: When he has leveled its surface, doesn’t he plant the dill, and scatter the cumin seed, and put in the wheat in rows, the barley in the appointed place, and the spelt in its place?

이사야 28:26.content: For his God instructs him in right judgment and teaches him.

이사야 28:27.content: For the dill are not threshed with a sharp instrument, neither is a cart wheel turned over the cumin; but the dill is beaten out with a stick, and the cumin with a rod.

이사야 28:28.content: Bread flour must be ground; so he will not always be threshing it. Although he drives the wheel of his threshing cart over it, his horses don’t grind it.

이사야 28:29.content: This also comes out from Yahweh of Armies, who is wonderful in counsel, and excellent in wisdom.
